---
title: "11 Calculate 5 Year Stock Performance"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
 # Intent: compute 5-year stock performance metrics ticker-by-ticker.
      # Naming is intentionally inconsistent to simulate real-world messy pipelines.
  five_year_anchor <-Sys.Date() - years(5)

stock5yr_metrics <- prices_clean_sorted %>%
 filter(date >= five_year_anchor)  %>%
   group_by(symbol) %>%
  summarise(
    PriceStart5= first(close),
price_end_5yr = last(close),
 dollarChange5yr = price_end_5yr - PriceStart5,
   pctChange_5YEAR = (price_end_5yr / PriceStart5 - 1) * 100,
  .groups="drop"
    )

 # Intent: inspect output names so students can map joins later.
   names(stock5yr_metrics)
```
